# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  pull_request:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: build-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      BUILD_DIR: dist
      BIN_DIR: dist/bin
      CFG_DIR: dist/config
      SCR_DIR: dist/scripts
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Prepare artifact directories
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf "${BUILD_DIR}"
          mkdir -p "${BIN_DIR}" "${CFG_DIR}" "${SCR_DIR}"

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x "./scripts/build.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/build.sh
          elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            make
          else
            echo "No build script found. Add scripts/build.sh or a Makefile." >&2
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Collect compiled binaries
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          shopt -s nullglob
          candidates=(
            "build/bin"
            "bin"
            "out/bin"
            "dist/bin"
            "target/release"
            "target/debug"
          )
          found=0
          for d in "${candidates[@]}"; do
            if [ -d "$d" ]; then
              echo "Copying binaries from $d"
              cp -a "$d/." "${BIN_DIR}/" || true
              found=1
            fi
          done
          if [ "$found" -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "No known binary output directories found. Ensure your build produces binaries into one of: ${candidates[*]}" >&2
          fi

      - name: Collect configuration files
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          shopt -s globstar nullglob
          for dir in config configs conf; do
            if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
              echo "Copying configs from $dir"
              mkdir -p "${CFG_DIR}/${dir}"
              cp -a "$dir/." "${CFG_DIR}/${dir}/"
            fi
          done
          for f in **/*.env **/*.yaml **/*.yml **/*.json **/*.toml **/*.ini; do
            case "$f" in
              */node_modules/*|*/.git/*|*/.github/*) continue ;;
            esac
            mkdir -p "${CFG_DIR}/misc/$(dirname "$f")"
            cp -a "$f" "${CFG_DIR}/misc/$f" || true
          done

      - name: Collect deployment scripts
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          shopt -s globstar nullglob
          for dir in deploy deployment deployments scripts infra terraform helm k8s kubernetes; do
            if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
              echo "Copying scripts from $dir"
              mkdir -p "${SCR_DIR}/${dir}"
              cp -a "$dir/." "${SCR_DIR}/${dir}/"
            fi
          done
          for f in **/*.sh **/*.ps1 **/*.bat **/*.cmd **/*.py **/*.rb **/*.pl; do
            case "$f" in
              */node_modules/*|*/.git/*|*/.github/*|*/venv/*|*/.venv/*|*/__pycache__/*) continue ;;
            esac
            mkdir -p "${SCR_DIR}/misc/$(dirname "$f")"
            cp -a "$f" "${SCR_DIR}/misc/$f" || true
          done
          chmod -R a+rX "${SCR_DIR}" || true

      - name: Add build metadata
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          {
            echo "repository=${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}"
            echo "ref=${GITHUB_REF}"
            echo "sha=${GITHUB_SHA}"
            echo "run_id=${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
            echo "run_number=${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
            echo "run_attempt=${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT}"
            echo "actor=${GITHUB_ACTOR}"
            echo "created_utc=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          } > "${BUILD_DIR}/BUILD_INFO.txt"

      - name: Create artifact archive
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          tar -czf build-artifacts-${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}.tar.gz -C "${BUILD_DIR}" .

      - name: Upload build artifacts (internal distribution)
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}-${{ github.sha }}
          path: |
            build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz
            dist/**
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
          compression-level: 6
